retry_reason: kref_put releases a reference; calling it again on the same object would be a double-put leading to use-after-free. Retry is invalid.
contract_summary: Put wrapper for batadv_orig_node_vlan: decrements the kref reference count and, if the count reaches zero, triggers the release callback to free the object. The caller must not use the orig_vlan pointer after this call unless it holds another valid reference. This function is safe to call with a NULL pointer (no-op).
